entries.definition:
with something, to overcome with, to afflict, to possess (11:54) إن
نقول إلا اعتراك بعض آلهتنا بسوء we say nothing but that some of our
gods have visited you with evil.

عُرْوَة ʿurwatun [n.] link, handle, bond, loop (31:22) ومن يسلم وجهه
إلى الله وهو محسن فقد استمسك بالعروة الوثقى whoever surrenders his face
[himself] to God while doing good work, has grasped the firmest
handhold.
entries.definition_english:
with something, to overcome with, to afflict, to possess (11:54) إن
نقول إلا اعتراك بعض آلهتنا بسوء we say nothing but that some of our
gods have visited you with evil.

عُرْوَة ʿurwatun [n.] link, handle, bond, loop (31:22) ومن يسلم وجهه
إلى الله وهو محسن فقد استمسك بالعروة الوثقى whoever surrenders his face
[himself] to God while doing good work, has grasped the firmest
handhold.

entries.definition:
ʿ–r–y remote open expanse of land, treeless area; nakedness,
to be naked, to become emaciated, to strip off, to strip meat off
bones; to evacuate. A degree of overlapping between this root and
root ع/ر/و ʿ–r–w exists, as might be expected of corresponding ي
and و radicals. Of this root, two forms occur three times in the
Qur’an: تَعْرَى taʿrā once and عَرَاء ʿarāʾ twice.

تَعْرَى taʿrā [imperf. of v. عَرِيَ ʿariya, intrans.] to be or become
naked (20:118) إن لك ألا تجوع فيها ولا تعرى it is [granted] for you that
you will neither go hungry, nor naked in it [the Garden].

عَرَاء ʿarāʾ [n] wide and open, barren, treeless land (37:145)
فنبذناه بالعراء وهو سقيم so We cast him out, ailing and thin, onto a
barren, open shore.
